core_payload.content:
# Agent Control Plane

## 1. Role
Agent Control Plane will become the administrative substrate through which one operator can discover, supervise, and govern a large N1Hub swarm across web, terminal, mobile, and daemon surfaces.

## 2. Future Governance Surface
- searchable activity views across all agent lanes
- unified session and assignment discovery across clients and daemon contexts
- programmatic policy rollout and canonical definition paths
- branch-aware audit trails for Dream and Real side effects
- lane budgeting for API, subscription, foreground, and night-shift work
- escalation and notification routing for failures, clarifications, and review requests

## 3. Assignment and Continuity Layer
The control plane will treat assignments, artifacts, ownership, and return paths as first-class objects. Swarm growth will remain intelligible because session history, budget posture, artifact lineage, and runtime health will project into one authoritative administrative surface instead of fragmenting across hidden local files or ad hoc dashboards.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Agent Control Plane supports To Dig Deep by making swarm scale come with accountability, inspectability, and economic discipline rather than invisible sprawl.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Agent Control Plane defines the future governance shell for the N1Hub swarm: searchable activity, assignment discovery, lane budgeting, branch-aware audit, policy rollout, and cross-client continuity managed as one coherent administrative substrate.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
